evals.name: standalone-creation
evals.expected_output: Detects no handoff artifact. Starts from Phase 1 (scope). Asks scoping questions about the initiative theme, features, and dependencies. Produces a roadmap at docs/roadmaps/ROADMAP-developer-tooling-pipeline.md with all required sections. Draft status.
expectations: Transcript checks for handoff artifact wip/roadmap_developer-tooling-pipeline_scope.md and determines it does not exist
Transcript starts from Phase 1 (scope) as the first workflow phase
Transcript describes asking the user scoping questions about the initiative theme, features, and dependencies
Transcript plans to produce output at docs/roadmaps/ROADMAP-developer-tooling-pipeline.md
Transcript mentions creating the document in Draft status

evals.name: explore-handoff-detection
evals.expected_output: Detects existing handoff artifact at wip/roadmap_release-automation_scope.md. Skips Phase 1 (scope) and resumes at Phase 2 (discover). Uses the handoff artifact's theme statement and candidate features as input.
expectations: Transcript checks for and detects existing handoff artifact at wip/roadmap_release-automation_scope.md
Transcript explicitly skips Phase 1 (scope) because the handoff artifact exists
Transcript proceeds to Phase 2 (discover) after detecting the handoff
Transcript describes using the handoff artifact's theme statement and candidate features as input for Phase 2

evals.name: lifecycle-activate
evals.expected_output: Detects 'activate' as a lifecycle verb. Validates at least 2 features exist. Runs transition-status.sh to transition from Draft to Active. Reports success.
expectations: Transcript identifies 'activate' as a lifecycle verb from the arguments
Transcript plans to validate that at least 2 features exist in the roadmap
Transcript plans to run scripts/transition-status.sh to perform the Draft to Active transition
Transcript does NOT plan to execute the full creation workflow (Phases 1-4)

evals.name: lifecycle-done
evals.expected_output: Detects 'done' as a lifecycle verb. Validates all features have terminal status. Runs transition-status.sh to transition from Active to Done. Roadmap stays in docs/roadmaps/ (no directory movement).
expectations: Transcript identifies 'done' as a lifecycle verb from the arguments
Transcript plans to validate that all features have terminal status (delivered or dropped)
Transcript plans to run scripts/transition-status.sh to perform the Active to Done transition
Transcript confirms roadmap stays in docs/roadmaps/ with no directory movement

evals.name: minimum-features-validation
evals.expected_output: During Phase 4 validation, the jury catches that fewer than 2 features exist. Validation fails. The roadmap is not finalized until at least 2 features are present.
expectations: Transcript recognizes the --auto flag and plans to operate in auto mode
Transcript includes Phase 4 jury validation as a required step
Transcript mentions the minimum 2 features requirement as a validation check
Transcript describes what happens when fewer than 2 features are found (validation failure or redirect to PRD)

evals.name: jury-review-quality
evals.expected_output: Phase 4 spawns 3 jury agents: theme coherence reviewer (features belong together), sequencing and dependency reviewer (dependencies explicit, rationale justified), annotation and boundary reviewer (needs-* labels accurate, no downstream content).
expectations: Transcript describes spawning 3 distinct jury agents in Phase 4
Transcript includes a theme coherence reviewer that checks whether features belong together under the theme
Transcript includes a sequencing and dependency reviewer that validates dependency relationships and ordering rationale
Transcript includes an annotation and boundary reviewer that checks needs-* labels and absence of downstream content

evals.name: crystallize-discrimination
evals.prompt: /explore --auto --strategic improve CI pipeline reliability and add deployment automation
evals.expected_output: Exploration in strategic scope with multiple features to sequence. Crystallize framework scores Roadmap higher than PRD because multiple independent features need coordinated sequencing. Routes to /roadmap via Phase 5 handoff.
expectations: Transcript recognizes this as an /explore command, not /roadmap directly
Transcript identifies the request contains multiple independent features needing coordinated sequencing
Transcript describes a crystallize or artifact type selection step that scores Roadmap higher than PRD
Transcript describes a Phase 5 handoff that routes to /roadmap with a scope artifact

evals.name: empty-argument-prompts
evals.expected_output: With no argument, skill asks the user what initiative they want to create a roadmap for. Does not assume a topic or start drafting immediately.
expectations: Transcript identifies that no argument was provided (empty $ARGUMENTS)
Transcript plans to ask the user what initiative they want to create a roadmap for
Transcript does NOT assume a topic or begin drafting without user input

evals.name: upstream-propagation
evals.expected_output: Detects --upstream flag from arguments. Stores the VISION path. During Phase 3 (draft), includes upstream: docs/visions/VISION-platform.md in the roadmap frontmatter.
expectations: Transcript detects and parses the --upstream flag from $ARGUMENTS
Transcript stores the upstream path (docs/visions/VISION-platform.md) for use in Phase 3
Transcript describes including upstream: in the roadmap frontmatter during Phase 3 drafting
Transcript does NOT treat --upstream as part of the topic name
